desc: Lead a team of 5 in developing digital solutions for Informatics students. Spearheading a full rebuild of the HMIF official website from scratch, while overseeing three specialized labs: Cyber Security, Artificial Intelligence, and Digital Interaction.
Coordinate the official study program introduction website and a real-time quiz platform. Build the main site in Next.js (TSX) and a Kahoot-like quiz app using React, Express, and Socket.io.

Led the web division for the Informatics Anniversary event. Developed a participant registration platform using Laravel and React, and built a real-time quiz application (Kahoot-style) powered by React, Express.js, and Socket.io. Coordinated development timelines and optimized the backend to handle concurrent user traffic during live sessions.
Led the web division developing an event website with Laravel and real-time features via Pusher. Coordinated timelines and optimized backend for concurrent user load.
Collaborated on the front-end of the official study program website using Next.js. Ensured responsiveness and cross-browser compatibility.
Developed and maintained organizational web applications. Conducted technical research to improve project quality and drive innovation.
Built a company profile web app with custom CMS in Laravel. Used Eloquent ORM to manage database queries and optimize MySQL storage.
